name: out_of_lives_title
description: Display lettering reading exactly "Out of Lives" — same chunky arched letterform family as a celebratory win title, but in a somber register: cool slate-blue and dulled silver letters, a cracked heart motif at the top center, muted teal ribbon behind. The words "Out of Lives" are the requested text.
prompt_extra: gently arched baseline; thick friendly letterforms with subtle outline; somber but not scary

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
